response.justification: The candidate is technically excellent and covers nearly every required skill — TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, SQL, plus nice-to-haves like Kubernetes, AWS, and recent LLM/MCP agent tooling experience. However, with roughly 18 years of experience and multiple Senior/Staff titles, he is significantly overqualified for an entry-level position, raising real questions about salary expectations, retention, and long-term fit in a junior/mid IC role with high on-site presence.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience directly matching the core stack
Covers nice-to-haves: Kubernetes, AWS (CDK), and recent LLM/MCP agentic tooling work
Proven track record of testable, craftsmanship-driven development (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role — retention and motivation risk
Likely salary expectations far above a junior/mid compensation band
Frontend depth is mostly Ember.js; React and PostgreSQL exposure appear comparatively limited

key_factors.factor: Full coverage of required tech stack
